headline: EU states continue expanding renewable targets
summary: Recent policy updates show that member states are raising renewable targets while supporting grid upgrades and domestic clean-energy manufacturing.

headline: Solar deployment accelerates across Europe
summary: Governments are encouraging faster solar rollout through subsidies, permitting reform, and energy-security programs.

headline: Wind investment remains central to decarbonization plans
summary: European decarbonization strategies continue to emphasize offshore and onshore wind along with transmission expansion.

headline: Storage investment gains political attention
summary: Policymakers increasingly view battery storage and grid flexibility as necessary for reliable renewable expansion.
